title: Marbella Yacht Charter New Year's Eve: Prices, Boats & Tips for 2026
html:
Start your new year with a flourish aboard a private yacht charter in Marbella, departing from Puerto Banús for a night of fireworks and champagne. Evening cruises typically cost from €1,500 for a small motorboat, with crewed superyachts reaching €8,000. BoatHire24 connects you directly with local owners and skippers for verified bookings.

How much does it cost to rent a yacht for New Year's Eve in Marbella?

A crewed 12-metre motor yacht starts at around €2,500 for a four-hour evening cruise. Shared party boats cost from €150 per person; luxury catamarans and superyachts exceed €6,000. All prices peak on 31 December, so early booking is essential.

Which boat to rent for a Marbella New Year's Eve charter?

  1. Azimut 50 flybridge, ideal for a group of up to 12 guests with a skipper; from €3,000 for the evening.
  2. Sunseeker Predator 68, spacious sports yacht for 8, 10 guests; from €4,500 including crew, champagne, and canapés.
  3. Lagoon 42 catamaran, stable and comfortable for 10 guests; from €2,800, perfect for families.
  4. Jet ski (Sea-Doo GTX), a thrilling daytime option for 2, 3 people; from €250 for one hour, or consider this jet ski listing in Marbella.

Where to set off in Marbella for a New Year's Eve cruise?

Puerto Banús is the main departure point for luxury charters, with direct access to the Mediterranean. The marina at Cabopino is quieter and closer to the dunes. From these bases, evening cruises typically head past the Bay of Marbella or towards the coastline of Estepona, where fireworks light up the sky at midnight. Some itineraries include a short hop to the island of Isla de Alborán, though that requires a longer passage. The port of La Bajadilla offers alternative departure options for smaller craft.

What are typical charter prices for New Year's Eve in Marbella?

  • Shared party boat (30, 50 guests, 4 hours): from €150 per person including open bar
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests, 4 hours): from €1,500 with fuel
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests, 8 hours): from €3,200 with crew
  • Luxury crewed yacht (12+ guests, full evening): from €5,000 to €8,000 inclusive

When planning your budget, browse boats for your dates on BoatHire24 to compare real available listings in euro.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

No licence is needed if you charter a yacht with a skipper, which is standard for New Year's Eve. For bareboat rental of smaller powerboats (up to 15 metres), an ICC or equivalent licence is required. The operator confirms exact requirements at booking. High-season months are July and August, but December evenings are cool; pay attention to the Levante wind, which can build from the east in the afternoon.
For a calm New Year's cruise, book a twilight departure at 6 p.m. from Puerto Banús; the fireworks display starts at midnight near the marina breakwater, and the Levante wind usually drops at sunset, leaving flat water.

At a glance

  • Price band: €150, €8,000
  • Peak months: December 31 only
  • Trip length: 4, 8 hours
  • Capacity: 2, 50 guests
  • Currency: EUR
  • Licence: Skipper required; bareboat requires ICC

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I rent a jet ski for New Year's Eve in Marbella?

Some operators offer jet ski rentals during daylight hours on 31 December, but the best option is a sunset ride before the evening festivities.

Is it better to rent a shared party boat or a private yacht?

A shared boat is social and affordable; a private yacht offers privacy, a personal crew, and custom catering for your group.

What is the cancellation policy for Marbella charters?

Most boat owners on BoatHire24 offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure; check the listing for specific terms.

What time do New Year's Eve charters typically start?

Evening cruises usually depart between 6 p.m. and 8 p.m., returning after midnight to enjoy the fireworks from the water.

For a memorable New Year's Eve, book your Marbella yacht charter through BoatHire24, where you can compare prices and verify availability directly with owners. If you own a boat in Marbella, you can also list it on the platform to earn extra income. Browse the listings to plan your perfect 2026 celebration on the Mediterranean.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
